attacks.name: Shatter
attacks.description:
1 hit x 160% damage 
 This attack has +120 Bonus.
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 160% damage, with +120 Bonus.

attacks.name: Ice Domain
attacks.description:
4 hits x 50% damage (200%) 
 Target: (On hit) -20 Ice resist for 3 turns.
attacks.effect: 4 hits of 50% damage, amounting to 200% damage; applies 'Ice Domain' (-20 Ice Resist) to target for 3 turns inclusive.

attacks.name: Shield
attacks.description: Hero: +40 Defenses for 6 turns.
attacks.effect: Applies 'Soul Shield' (+40 Block/Parry/Dodge Defense) to player for 6 turns.

attacks.description: 1 hit x 150% damage to all targets
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 150% damage to all foes.

attacks.name: Attack
attacks.description: 3 hits x 40% damage (120%)
attacks.effect: 3 hits of 40% damage, amounting to 120% damage, with -5 Bonus.

notes:
• Players initially required to equip the  SoulWeaver class to invite Aegis (1); this requirement was modified to unlocking the  SoulWeaver class on  February 28th, 2025.
• The following changes were implemented on  April 11th, 2025:
  • Aegis (1)'s tooltips were updated.
• 'Shatter', 'Ice Domain', and 'Hailstorm' skills were modified.

attacks.description: Focus your fury to stun foe
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 160% damage, with 30 Bonus; applies 'Cannot attack' to target, stunning it for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Dragon's Breath
attacks.description: Embrace the burning fury of dragons.
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 100% damage; applies 'Dragon Fire' (a 50% Magic Fire DoT effect, -10 All Resist, +10 Health Resist) to target for 4 turns inclusive.

attacks.description: Available after a successful Pierce
attacks.effect: 3 hits of 150% damage, amounting to 450% damage.

attacks.description: Unlocked after a succesful attack.
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 150% damage.

attacks.name: Attack
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 120% damage, with +60 Bonus.

notes:
• Alteon has a series of unconventional stats in the quests  Hawk in the Sky,  Crash and Burn,  The Flame Within,  At Fissure's Edge,  The Final Steps, and  Convergence (Part 1):
  • Alteon gains -10 Immobility,  -60 Health, + 60 All Resists.
• Alteon's base damage is increased by 50%.
• Skip skill was added with the release of  Crash and Burn.

name: Amadeus

obtainMethods.location: Chasing Answers,  Outpost Outskirts,  Hawk in the Sky,  Crash and Burn,  The Flame Within,  At Fissure's Edge,  The Final Steps,  Convergence (Part 1) -> Invite Alteon and Amadeus

attacks.name: Lost Blade
attacks.description: Swap between Darkness and seeking.
attacks.effect: Toggles Amadeus' attacks between Darkness damage and weakness seeking damage. (Pop-ups: Amadeus: 'I am not ruled by Darkness!' / Amadeus: 'Back to the shadows...')

attacks.name: Hold Nothing Back
attacks.description: Skills empowered for 3 turns, but cost % HP.
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 160% damage to all foes, with +30 Bonus; in the next three turns, Amadeus is empowered and certain skills gain additional effects, but at the cost of 5% of his maximum HP. (Pop-ups: Amadeus: 'You will not stand in my way.' / Amadeus: 'This pain... is nothing...')

attacks.name: Embrace the Darkness
attacks.description: Unleash a powerful attack.
attacks.effect:
5 hits of 50% damage, amounting to 250% damage.
  • If Amadeus is empowered, attack will instead perform 17 hits of 50% damage, amounting to 850% damage.

attacks.name: Heartcleaver
attacks.description: Critical attack.
attacks.effect: 3 hits of 120% damage, amounting to 360% damage, with +200 Crit; if Amadeus is empowered, attack gains an additional +20% damage.

attacks.name: Rush
attacks.description: Available after a successful Pierce
attacks.effect: 3 hits of 150% damage, amounting to 450% damage; if Amadeus is empowered, attack gains an additional +30% damage.

attacks.name: Pierce
attacks.description: Unlocked after a succesful attack.
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 150% damage; if Amadeus is empowered, attack gains an additional +50% damage.

attacks.name: Attack
attacks.effect:
1 hit of 120% damage, with +60 Bonus; recovers 5% of Amadeus' maximum HP.
  • If Amadeus is empowered, the heal effect will not be applied and attack gains an additional +30% damage.

notes:
• Amadeus has a series of unconventional stats in the quests  Hawk in the Sky,  Crash and Burn,  The Flame Within,  At Fissure's Edge,  The Final Steps, and  Convergence (Part 1):
  • Amadeus gains -10 Immobility,  -60 Health, +60 All Resists.
• Amadeus' base damage is increased by 50%.
• Lost Blade and Skip skills were added with the release of  Crash and Burn.

attacks.effect: Approaches target and strikes it upwards with a jump, then again on the way down for 2 hits of 60% damage, for a total of 120% damage.

attacks.effect: Approaches target, raises his axe, then kicks target instead for 1 hit of 100% damage; applies 'Stunned' to target, stunning it for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack
attacks.effect: Approaches target and strikes it for 1 hit of 100% damage.

notes: • Batoro's stun duration was lowered from 2 turns to 1 turn on February 28th, 2020; more information can be found in the  February 28th, 2020 Design Notes.

name: King Linus
notes:
• Attack Type 2's rate is equal to [(Pet's Crit) + (Player's LUK)/10]: (Pop-up: Need <= <x> to shrink | Rolled <y>)
  • If the target has already been shrunken, its HP and size will not be reduced again. (Pop-up: Linus tries... but <target's name> is already SHRUNK!)
• If the target's Shrink Resist (inclusive of All Resist) is greater than an unknown second roll value, it will resist the shrinking effect. (Pop-up: Linus tries... but <target's name> resists!)
• Attack Type 2 previously renamed targets 'Shrunken <target's name>'; due to its potential to break battle mechanics, this was removed on  July 3rd, 2020.
• Despite requiring a DC item to obtain, the Platinum Penguin Shrink Ray merge version of this pet is not DC tagged, thus ineligible for free storage.
• Pet is animated; it sways back and forth continuously.
